steps.title: Identify both data sets from the plots
steps.content: Set A's dot plot has mean $10\,\mu\text{F}$ and range $12\,\mu\text{F}$. Set B shifts every value up by $14\,\mu\text{F}$.

steps.title: Compute the relevant statistic for each
steps.content: Adding a constant shifts the mean by that constant but leaves the range unchanged: $$\text{mean}_B = 10 + 14 = 24, \quad \text{range}_B = 12.$$

steps.title: Compare and conclude
steps.content: So mean $24\,\mu\text{F}$, range $12\,\mu\text{F}$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
